name: Kyoto University Microcomputer Club (KMC)
notes:
- Because we're a non-profit organization, our acceptable connection methods for peering is very limited.
  - e.g. private peer only, perhaps tunneling in most cases
- Feel free to reach us via email.

----

- We serve a geofeed for our prefixes at <https://as-geofeed.kmc.gr.jp/geofeed.csv>
    - single /24, /48 are used across multiple regions in Japan and occasionally relocates to an another region
    - our NIR - JPNIC doesn't support publishing this using RFC 9092 :/
